rulings.Case Title: YUSON WEI YUE LUI VS. ANNA YIT NOR LUI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Yuson Lui, Susan Lui, Dick Liu Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2019 line 3. Plaintiffs Yuson Lui, Susan Lui, Dick Liu's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint GRANTED in part, denied in part and moot in part. Motion is with leave to add a new cause of action for declaratory relief regarding Yen Chan Lui and Ng Sau Fong Lui Revocable Trust and Bypass Trust. The motion is otherwise DENIED, moot, and or previously granted. Hearing Required to address new trial date in light of the Court's rulings. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUSON WEI YUE LUI VS. ANNA YIT NOR LUI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication / Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANTs ANNA LUI, LILY LUI, NG LUI, RAYMOND LUI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication / Notice Of Motion DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is GRANTED in part and DENIED in Part. The Court will treat parts of the motion as a motion for Judgment on the Pleadings and will grant it with leave to amend as to cause of action for partition to remove parties without standing and to include all necessary parties. Motion for summary adjudication as to the cause of action for declaratory relief is granted without leave to amend. Motions for Summary Judgment is framed by the pleadings, there is no actual controversy regarding the declarations sought in the complaint. Motion for summary adjudication is DENIED as to the causes of action for breach of contract, breach of fiduciary duty, and accounting as to defendant Anna Yit Nor Lui ("Anna"). There are multiple triable issues of fact regarding Anna's contractual and fiduciary responsibilities in regards to management of the property, collection of rent, and accounting for all income and expenses generated by the property. While some recovery may be barred by the statute or limitations, some breaches occurred within the statute of limitations and the defense of laches is not applicable to them. Statute of frauds is not applicable to contracts involving management of property; and no authority is cited for the proposition that contracts for hiring residential units cannot be oral. Motion for summary adjudication of causes of action for breach of contract and breach of fiduciary duty by other defendants is GRANTED. No authority and no evidence is provided to support the elements of causes of action for breach of contract and breach of fiduciary duty. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUSON WEI YUE LUI VS. ANNA YIT NOR LUI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Anna Lui, Lily Lui, Raymond Lui, Ng Lui Notice Of Motion To Quash
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2019 line 3. Defendants Anna Lui, Lily Lui, Raymond Lui, Ng Lui's Motion To Quash GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to number 1 and 3 the Chase subpoena. Motion is denied as to number 2 in the Chase subpoena. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted as to the fact of the filing of the documents, but not as to the contents. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 20, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT LEIGH TAYLOR, MARIA SHARPE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part.
